purpose: Existence bound for the inter-deploy collection cycle (rows between corpus freeze and chain activation), so every corpus row carries at least an existence anchor.
gap_desc: gap_rows_20260606.csv.gz - 20406 signals, id 16807131..16827536, uniform signal ts 2026-06-06T07:54:08.371626Z (single cycle-start timestamp)
cause: Legitimate collection cycle (signal timestamp 2026-06-06T07:54:08Z = cycle start; committed ~08:18Z per service log) executed by the pre-patch collector. It was in-flight (uncommitted) in the live container DB at the genesis freeze (07:54:41Z, a .backup of the lagging host snapshot), hence excluded from corpus a5989f despite a near-coincident timestamp; it predates chain activation (09:00:30Z). Existence-anchored here as of this record's OpenTimestamps stamp, disclosed as a same-day anchor. Rows remain in the live DB (legitimate signals); this artifact only establishes their existence bound.
note: Separate OTS stamp by necessity: the genesis anchor record (919180a9) is cryptographically closed and cannot be appended retroactively.
